log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Custom Lineage — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Custom Lineage — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Custom Lineage — Armored Tank.
→ Custom Lineage — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 24/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Custom Lineage — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Custom Lineage — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 130/135
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Custom Lineage — Armored Tank.
→ Custom Lineage — Armored Tank healed for 7 HP. HP: 31/59
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Custom Lineage — Armored Tank: FAIL! 31 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
